title: AutoRefill - BTA
description: BTA QoL mod used to instantly replace active hotbar slots.                                                       For bta 7.1 - 7.3_04 versions.
body:
## AutoRefill **
_Requires HalbLibe => 5.1.2_** A singleplayer minecraft beta mod specifically made for Minecraft Better Than Adventure 7.3 and previous versions. AutoRefill is a small QoL mod that automatically tries to replace the block stack you just fully consumed (if available) from one of your other inventory slots. This makes building for example a lot more pleasant.





![Mod setting page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8a2268d293a6d57c81e45426e41699f4f4f5bf7.png) #### Disclaimer: * This mod is not designed for multiplayer.
